desc.zh: 暑假提前接触编程，为大学课程打下程序设计基础
desc.en: Started learning C programming over the summer, laying a foundation for university coursework

desc.zh: 进入武汉科技大学，就读管理科学与工程类专业
desc.en: Entered WUST, majoring in Management Science & Engineering

desc.zh: 成为心协干事，参与组织校园心理健康宣传活动与同伴支持
desc.en: Became an officer, helping organize mental health awareness activities and peer support on campus

desc.zh: 代表学院参加新生杯足球赛，扫荡型中场，获得二等奖
desc.en: Represented the college in the freshman football cup, box-to-box midfielder, won 2nd place

title.zh: 转入 AI 科创实验班

desc.zh: 参加人工智能科创实验班选拔并成功进入，正式转向 AI 方向
desc.en: Passed the selection for the AI Innovation Experimental Class, officially pivoting to AI

desc.zh: 在 B 站系统学习 Python 和 C++ 课程，开始搭建编程技能栈
desc.en: Systematically studied Python and C++ through Bilibili courses, building up programming skills

desc.zh: 通过选拔加入机器人团队，目前在学 MATLAB 与线性代数打基础
desc.en: Joined the robotics team through selection. Currently building foundations with MATLAB and Linear Algebra

desc.zh: 穿插学习机器学习、大模型部署微调与 Vibe Coding，始终关注大模型前沿动态，在探索中前行
desc.en: Learning ML, LLM deployment & fine-tuning, and Vibe Coding along the way. Always following LLM frontier developments — moving forward through exploration
